analysis.aurc_scale: raw [0,1]; renderers may display 100 x AURC
analysis.estimand: descriptive target-model training-seed variation over seeds 0,1,2
analysis.inference: none; no image pooling and no seed-level hypothesis test
analysis.statistics: three values, mean, range, and sample standard deviation

gate_c.decision: move three-seed table to the main results and call the affected comparison training-sensitive
